title: `atsam #6105
definition:
1) to be vast, be numerous, be mighty
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be mighty
        1a2) to be numerous
    1b) (Hiphil) to make strong, make mighty
 2) to shut (the eyes), close (the eyes)
    2a) (Qal) to shut (the eyes)
    2b) (Piel) to shut tightly (the eyes)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be vast, be numerous, be mighty
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be mighty
        1a2) to be numerous
    1b) (Hiphil) to make strong, make mighty
 2) to shut (the eyes), close (the eyes)
    2a) (Qal) to shut (the eyes)
    2b) (Piel) to shut tightly (the eyes)

    NASB:  to be vast, mighty, numerous
